commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared Codex host-mutation authorization helper, gates `/codex computer-use install` behind owner or `operator.admin`, preserves read-only status behavior, adds focused command tests, and documents the install boundary.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +62, Docs +3. Total +69 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main routes authorized `/codex computer-use install` to `installCodexComputerUse` without an owner/admin check, and that callee can call Codex `plugin/install`. I did not run a live app-server reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer/security review is required because the PR has a protected label, intentionally changes fail-closed authorization behavior, and lacks real behavior proof; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair.
